title: Slider widget ignores step when dragged
body: Dragging the slider snaps to arbitrary values instead of honoring the configured `step`. Expected the thumb to snap to multiples of `step`.

title: Add keyboard navigation to the tabs widget
body: Tabs should be navigable with ArrowLeft / ArrowRight for accessibility.

title: Tooltip flickers near viewport edge
body: When a tooltip is near the right edge it repositions every frame and flickers.

title: Document the theming API
body: The theming tokens are undocumented; add a docs page.
